changes.description: Added STRUCTURAL_ESCALATION_CONDITIONS, EXPANSION_TYPE_LABELS, INTERROGATION_EXPANSION_REGISTRY constants. Extended IntelligenceField with PI state model (piRuntimeActive, activeExpansionIndex, interrogationTrail, escalationAvailable, escalationContext, expansions). Extended SupportRail with structural depth affordance and expansion chips. Extended ExecutiveInterpretation with expansion rendering branch. Wired PI props through return JSX.
Extended footer disclosure to recognize PI_INTERPRETIVE authority tier with structural depth language. Added interaction authority row in expanded governance details.
Added CSS for structural depth indicator, expansion chips, expansion answer panel, depth-escalated intelligence field indicator. All styles follow existing design system.
Added §2.1 PI Runtime Layer Authorization — expanding persona scope from EXECUTIVE_BALANCED to ALL FOUR MODES when PI Runtime Layer is active. All 13 absolute prohibitions remain non-overridable.
Stream closure with Section 10 (G1 Architecture Memory Propagation).
Implementation semantics for PI Runtime Layer primitives.
Added PI Runtime Layer, Interaction Authority, Transversal Interrogation as locked terms.
Updated S6 description, Phase 5 roadmap, added 5B.3 Architectural Contributions section.
